name: Chinese Crocodile Lizard
conservationEfforts: Protected under Chinese law. Nature reserves established in Guangxi. International captive breeding program. Vietnam populations also receive protection.
description: A semi-aquatic lizard that resembles a miniature crocodile. When threatened, it plays dead (thanatosis), remaining motionless for up to 30 minutes. One of the most sought-after reptiles in the pet trade.
